heading: Equipment scheduled for retirement or disposal: limitation on expenditures for modifications
label: 2244a Equipment scheduled for retirement or disposal: limitation on expenditures for modifications
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , , , which was set out as a note under , prior to repeal by , .Pub. L. 105–56, title VIII, § 8053111 Stat. 1232section 2241 of this titlePub. L. 109–163, div. A, title III, § 372(c)119 Stat. 3210Oct. 8, 1997
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , , , which was set out as a note under , prior to repeal by , .Pub. L. 105–56, title VIII, § 8053111 Stat. 1232section 2241 of this titlePub. L. 109–163, div. A, title III, § 372(c)119 Stat. 3210Oct. 8, 1997

children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the Secretary of a military department may not carry out a modification of an aircraft, weapon, vessel, or other item of equipment that the Secretary plans to retire or otherwise dispose of within five years after the date on which the modification, if carried out, would be completed.

children.heading: .—Exception for below-threshold modifications
children.label: 1 .—Exception for below-threshold modifications
children.text: The prohibition in subsection (a) does not apply to a modification for which the cost is less than $100,000.

children.heading: .—Exception for transfer of reusable items of value
children.label: 2 .—Exception for transfer of reusable items of value
A
children.text: the reusable items of value, as determined by the Secretary, installed on the item of equipment as part of such modification will, upon the retirement or disposal of the item to be modified, be removed from such item of equipment, refurbished, and installed on another item of equipment; and

children.label: B
children.text: the cost of such modification (including the cost of the removal and refurbishment of reusable items of value under subparagraph (A)) is less than $1,000,000.

children.heading: .—Exception for safety modifications
children.label: 3 .—Exception for safety modifications
children.text: The prohibition in subsection (a) does not apply to a safety modification.

children.heading: .—Waiver Authority
children.label: c .—Waiver Authority
children.text: The Secretary concerned may waive the prohibition in subsection (a) in the case of any modification otherwise subject to that subsection if the Secretary determines that carrying out the modification is in the national security interest of the United States. Whenever the Secretary issues such a waiver, the Secretary shall notify the congressional defense committees in writing.
